title: Selena Mersey Bisexuelle
description: Johnny is a hard-boiled detective from New York City, California, and he’s got just one more case to crack before he retires from the CSI Miami. See, somebody did a very bad thing, and he'll be damned if they get away with it. But there’s one thing Johnny didn’t expect. The clues all start to point towards the mysterious dame he met this morning... Featuring original music, dance, questionable puppetry, and side-splitting laughs, Bisexuelle is the hotly anticipated second show from Brighton Fringe multi-award winner and Musical Comedy Awards finalist Selena Mersey. "Heartfelt and hilarious... Mersey is a star of the Fringe" ★★★★★ The Reviews Hub "Some of the most fun you’ll have at the Fringe... seductive, silly and incredibly smart" ★★★★ The List Directed by Annie North
content_warnings: Swearing; themes of biphobia and misogyny; mention of guns, theft, gambling, fraud, alcohol dependency, violence, and murder

venue.name: Komedia Studio
venue.address: 44-47 Gardner Street, 44-46 Gardner Street, East Sussex
